# pulp_group (Resource)

Manages a Pulp Group for any content type.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name for this Group.

### Read-Only

- `pulp_href` (String) The `pulp_href` (used as the resource identifier).
